place: Ban, Mae Nam, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sea-View Pool Villa in Maenam
blurb: A modern five-bedroom tropical sanctuary in Maenam on Koh Samui's quiet north shore — a striking 16-metre L-shaped infinity pool angled for sea and sunset views, an open-air sala, gym and games, set on a leafy 1,600 m² plot near Bang Po beach.
detail:
Nestled in the enchanting Maenam district on Koh Samui's tranquil north coast, this modern five-bedroom villa is a tropical sanctuary blending luxury, comfort and awe-inspiring natural surroundings across an expansive 1,600 m² plot. Inside, five exquisitely furnished bedrooms each carry a private en-suite, with a dedicated kids' room of two bunk beds sleeping up to four children — comfortable for families and groups alike.

The villa's centrepiece is a striking 16-metre L-shaped infinity pool, thoughtfully positioned to maximise mesmerising views of the glistening sea and the island's celebrated sunsets. An open-air sala invites quiet moments amid the greenery, while a well-equipped gym, a foosball table, board games and a Devialet sound system keep every kind of guest entertained. High-speed WiFi covers the property, and each bedroom is finished with a safety box and refined details.

A dedicated team of three including a private chef crafts culinary masterpieces to your taste, with daily housekeeping, a complimentary daily breakfast and turndown service. Minutes from Bang Po beach and a short drive from Fisherman's Village and Santiburi golf, it is an oasis of calm where panoramic sea views meet warm, attentive island hospitality.
